LFC Fixtures
Your Liverpool FC companion
☕ Buy Me a Coffee
About

Built by a Liverpool supporter, for Liverpool supporters — a fast, clean way to check fixtures, results and head-to-head records without navigating a full website.

Live fixture data is refreshed automatically. Live fixture data is refreshed automatically. Historical results go back to 1894, covering over 7,700 matches across all competitions.

📋 Fixtures

The home screen shows your next fixture as a hero card, with a countdown to kick-off, recent league form dots, and the last result. Upcoming fixtures are listed below.

Use the H / A / All and competition filters to narrow the list. The search bar lets you find any opponent by name. Tap any fixture to open a detail popup with H2H record, kick-off time and calendar export.

Tip: tap any past result to see the full details — score, manager, round and attendance if known.

The hero card now shows a current form streak alongside the last-5 dots — e.g. W4 in green when Liverpool are on a four-match winning run. Tap the Last result strip to jump straight to the Head to Head view for that opponent.

📅 Calendar

A month-by-month view of all fixtures. The nav badge shows how many fixtures are in the current month. Past match days are colour-coded — green for wins, gold for draws, red for losses.

Tap any date to see that day's matches. Dates with no fixture show a "No fixture on this date" message. Use the arrow buttons to move between months, or tap Today to return to the current month.

🏆 Results

Browse all historical results from 1894 to today. Filter by competition, season, manager, era (Pre-War, Post-War, Prem Era, This Season, Last Season) or home/away — filters are remembered when you switch tabs. Each competition tab shows a live count of how many results match the current filter.

The stats strip at the top updates with the current filter: total played, won, drawn, lost, and goals for/against. If no results match, a Clear filters button resets everything in one tap.

Tap any result card for full details including manager, round and attendance.

🕐 On This Day

Shows every Liverpool match played on today's date in previous years, grouped by decade. Tap the date picker to explore any date — your chosen date is remembered when you switch tabs and come back.

Significant anniversaries are highlighted — 25 yrs in gold, 50 yrs in red. The biggest winning margin of the day has its score underlined.

Cup finals are marked with a red FINAL badge. Big wins of five goals or more get a green 5-0 WIN style badge. Both are highlighted in red to stand out from the rest of the day's results.

If no matches are found for a date, Previous day and Next day buttons let you step through until you find one. Tap any result to reveal the manager and attendance.

✈️ Away Planner

Log your away trips or holidays so you can see which matches you'll miss. Add a trip name and date range — the app automatically finds every fixture in that window, showing whether each is home or away.

Trips are sorted by start date. For past trips, the actual score and result are displayed automatically. The top of the planner shows a countdown to your next upcoming trip.

To delete a trip, hold the ✕ button for half a second — this prevents accidental deletions on mobile. Your planner data is stored locally and is never affected by an app refresh.

On the results screen, tap Share to send your missed-matches list (respecting any Home/Away or competition filter you've applied) to anyone via your device's share sheet.

📊 Stats

Analyse Liverpool's record across five dimensions: Manager, Competition, Season, Venue (home/away) and Opponent. Covers all 5,700+ matches.

Use the Sort by chips to order cards by most played, win % or A–Z. Stack the competition, home/away, match type and Era filters to narrow down further. When multiple filters are active a Clear all filters button appears so you can reset in one tap. In Opponent mode, a search box appears to filter across all 480+ clubs instantly.

Each card shows P/W/D/L, goals, GD, average attendance and the last 5 results as form dots. In Season mode, tap any card to expand a full competition breakdown for that year. The bar chart shows win % for the top 12 in the current view.

⚔️ Head to Head

Search any of the 480+ clubs Liverpool have faced since 1894. The H2H view shows overall W/D/L records as both a donut chart and a horizontal bar chart, your best win and worst loss, and a full match-by-match result list.

Filter by era (Pre-War, Post-War, Premier League era, This Season, Last Season), venue (home/away/neutral), competition and manager. Each result row shows the competition logo alongside the match details.

Tap ← Back to search at the top of any team view to return to the club list. Access H2H from the Stats tab, from any fixture card, or by tapping the Last result on the hero card.

Author

Duffers — a Liverpool fan who builds small apps to scratch everyday itches.

📡 Offline Support

The app works fully offline once it has been loaded at least once. If your connection drops, a banner at the top of the screen lets you know you're viewing cached data — no action needed.

Fixtures and results are cached locally, so you can check kick-off times and historical records even without a signal. Data refreshes automatically the next time you're online.

Add to Home Screen

Install this app on your device for the full experience — no App Store needed.

1
iPhone / iPad (Safari) — tap the Share button (box with arrow) then choose Add to Home Screen.
2
Android (Chrome) — tap the three-dot menu then choose Add to Home Screen or Install App.
3
Desktop (Chrome / Edge) — look for the install icon (⊕) in the address bar.
Refreshing the App

Normal tap on the ↺ button re-fetches the latest fixture data.

Long-press (hold 2 seconds) on ↺ does a full app refresh — clears the cache and reloads everything. Useful if an update hasn't come through.

Your Away Planner trips and preferences are stored separately and are never affected by a refresh.
